name: Sausage Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before starting.
2. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
3. Cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
4. Stir in the milk.
5. Continue stirring until thoroughly blended.
6. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
7. Knead lightly 3 or 4 times.
8. Roll the dough into a (18" x 22") rectangle.
9. Spread the sausage over the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch margin all around the edges.
10. Carefully roll the dough lengthwise in jellyroll fashion.
11. Pinch the seam and the edges to seal.
12. Cover.
13. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
14. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
15. Slice the dough into 1/4 inch thick slices.
16. Arrange the slices 1 inch apart on baking sheets.
17. Bake until browned (about 20 minutes).
18. Serve warm.
